g.text: Acceptance eval (30 tasks x 32 samples) vs unseen 2-number tasks - same protocol, max_new_tokens=12

rect.style: stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 0; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 0;

text.style: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; fill: rgb(107, 114, 128); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre;
text.tspan: Conclusion: GRPO lifts valid expressions 5.83% -> 99.38% and exact solves 0.73% -> 16.35% in-distribution,
and keeps nearly the whole gain on never-seen 2-number tasks - transfer, not memorization.
